parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the sample and reset logic threshold

parameters.name: vinit
parameters.override_behavior: sets the initial and reset held-output voltage

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.override_behavior: sets the fraction of the remaining vin-to-vout error acquired per update

parameters.name: tick
parameters.override_behavior: sets the interval between acquisition updates while sample is high

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets vout and metric transition smoothing

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic timer-driven acquisition state and continuous voltage output contributions.
Preserve the acquired state between sample windows.
Do not add undeclared ports, hidden tracking paths, or validation-only sample times.

properties.observable_contract: While rst is above vth, vout returns to vinit and metric is low.
When sample is above vth and reset is inactive, metric is high and vout is allowed to acquire vin.
At each tick during acquisition, vout advances by alpha times the remaining difference from the current vin rather than jumping instantaneously.
For a constant vin and repeated acquisition updates, vout moves monotonically toward vin without overshoot for the declared alpha range.
A falling sample crossing freezes the last acquired value; vout holds it and metric remains low until acquisition resumes or reset is asserted.

title: Acquisition Limited Sample And Hold
